title: RetroFeVLC
subtitle: The powerful evolution of RetroFE — now with VLC, smart addons & next-level customization
welcome-text: RetroFeVLC is a powerful fork of RetroFE that replaces GStreamer with VLC, bringing dozens of new features, a smart addon system, and a much more user-friendly experience.
whatsnew-text:
• Menu Options: Settings, Controls, Layout
  • 4K Support + Scale Quality Options
  • Rock-Solid Stability – add new screens without crashes
  • Animated Images (GIF + WebP support)
  • Memory leak fixes for silky-smooth performance
  • New playlist ordering options
  • Game Search (external addon)
  • Dynamic Playlists: ALL GAMES, ALL FAVORITES, ALL LASTPLAYED with real-time updates
  • New Grid menu option
  • Layout include files + Variables support
  • GameInfo stats (play count, most played game, etc.)
  • Per-game layouts

RetroFeVLC supports RetroAchievements sync, Kiosk Mode, and the beautiful Phoenix Demo Theme.
whatis-text:
RetroFeVLC is a complete, high-performance front-end for your retro game collection.

RetroFeVLC (The Face): Beautiful, fast, powered by VLC for perfect video previews.
Start.exe (The Brain): Your all-in-one management tool for settings, controllers, launchers and playlists.

It shows your games with menus, artwork, videos and lets you launch any emulator. Think Netflix UI, but for your retro games.
quickguide-text:
1. Download the Full All Addons Include version
2. Extract to any folder (e.g. E:\RetroFeVLC)
3. Run Start.exe
4. Right-click tray icon → RetroFeVLC Options
5. Add your game collections and enjoy!
layouts-text:
Extremely powerful layout system with grids, per-game layouts, 3D effects, random media, and in-frontend Options Menu.
The official Phoenix Theme includes 12 menu styles – the ultimate showcase of what RetroFeVLC can do.
